subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! When a fair-minded soul gazeth upon himself, he becometh characterized by the utmost humility and supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان انسان منصف چون نظر بخویش نماید بنهایت عجز و ابتهال متصف شود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @prayer for the departed
